testsuite.name: com.turbopremios.auth.service.AuthServiceTest

testcase.name: login should throw UnauthorizedException when credentials are invalid()
register should throw ConflictException when email already exists()
login should return auth response when credentials are valid()
register should create user and return auth response()

testsuite.system-out: 11:17:59.195 [Test worker] INFO com.turbopremios.auth.service.AuthService -- User logged in: test@test.com 11:17:59.366 [Test worker] INFO com.turbopremios.auth.service.AuthService -- New user registered: new@test.com
